news.t: Target stock's best day in 9 months boosts retail EFTs

holdings.infoBox: WBIG is an equity ETF with a total of 84 individual holdings. The top holdings are WisdomTree Interest Rate Hedged U.S. Aggregate Bond Fund stock at 2.66%, Angel Oak High Yield Opportunities ETF at 2.47%, Amphenol at 2.09%, Cash & Other at 1.94%, and Kimberly-Clark at 1.90%.

overview.description: The WBI BullBear Yield 3000 ETF (WBIG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed fund of global equities from all capitalizations that focuses on dividend yields. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation with reduced volatility during market declines. WBIG was launched on Aug 27, 2014 and is issued by WBI Shares.

data.title: Target stock's best day in 9 months boosts retail EFTs
data.text: Exchange-traded funds with big holdings in Target Inc. TGT, +12.19% outperformed Wednesday after the retailer reported quarterly results that blew away expectations.
